# How to Win Dice Game Malaysia

> Free online dice game for Malaysian players. No download, no registration. Play instantly in your browser.

## About This Game

How to Win Dice Game Malaysia is a free browser-based dice game designed for Malaysian players.

- **Live Game**: https://johmark2026-svg.github.io/how-to-win-dice-game-malaysia/
- **Strategy Guide**: https://www.arvanvod.com/how-to-win-dice-game-malaysia/how-to-win-dice-game-malaysia.html
- **Source Code**: https://github.com/johmark2026-svg/how-to-win-dice-game-malaysia

## How to Play

Choose a prediction (Big 11-18, Small 3-10, Triple, Odd, Even, or Total 7). Add chips for your bet amount, then click ROLL to throw three dice.
